tiers.name: Beginner
tiers.description: Start your AI journey. No experience needed.

courses.title: Claude for Beginners
courses.description: Learn to use Claude AI to automate your work life. From first conversation to building your personal assistant.

courses.title: AI Foundations
courses.description: Understand how AI actually works — neurons, prompts, embeddings — through hands-on exploration.

courses.title: AI for Business Owners
courses.description: Cut through the AI hype. Learn what AI can (and can't) do for your business, with ROI calculators and policy templates.

courses.title: AI for Creatives
courses.description: AI tools for writers, designers, and musicians. Generate ideas, remix work, and amplify your creative output.

courses.title: AI for Executives
courses.description: C-suite AI literacy. Strategy, risk assessment, vendor evaluation, and leading AI transformation.

courses.title: Prompt Writing 101
courses.description: Master the art of talking to AI. Structure prompts that get exactly what you need, every time.

courses.title: AI Ethics & Safety
courses.description: Responsible AI use. Bias, privacy, misinformation, and building AI systems you can trust.

courses.title: AI for Marketing
courses.description: Content, social media, email campaigns, and analytics — all supercharged with AI.

courses.title: AI for Personal Productivity
courses.description: Automate your daily workflow. Email, scheduling, note-taking, research — reclaim 10+ hours per week.

courses.title: Getting Started with AI Images & Video
courses.description: Create stunning visuals with AI. Image generation, video editing, and visual storytelling for non-designers.

tiers.name: Intermediate
tiers.description: Build real systems. Connect tools. Ship products.

courses.title: Claude Mastery
courses.description: Advanced Claude techniques — system prompts, chain of thought, tool use, MCP servers, and building agents.

courses.title: Automation Architect
courses.description: Design AI-powered automations. Triggers, APIs, smart routing, and production workflows.

courses.title: Build Your First AI Agent
courses.description: From chatbot to agent. The agent loop, tool calling, memory systems, and evaluation.

courses.title: AI Stack Builder
courses.description: Full-stack AI development. Supabase, Vercel, Make.com, edge functions, and deployment.

courses.title: AI Content Studio
courses.description: Create videos, images, and audio with AI. Build a content pipeline that produces professional-quality media.

courses.title: AI for Data Analysis
courses.description: Turn data into decisions. AI-powered dashboards, reports, and business intelligence for non-engineers.

courses.title: Advanced Prompt Engineering
courses.description: Prompt chains, few-shot learning, structured outputs, and production-grade prompt systems.

courses.title: AI Project Management
courses.description: Run projects with AI copilots. Planning, tracking, risk assessment, and team coordination — automated.

courses.title: Building AI-Powered Workflows
courses.description: Connect AI to your existing tools. CRM, email, docs, spreadsheets — build workflows that think.

courses.title: AI for Sales & Revenue
courses.description: AI-powered sales pipelines. Lead scoring, outreach automation, forecasting, and closing with AI assist.

tiers.name: Advanced
tiers.description: Master-level AI. Build what doesn't exist yet.

courses.title: MCP & AI Tool Integration
courses.description: Model Context Protocol deep dive. Architecture, servers, tools, resources, and production integrations.

courses.title: RAG & Vector Search
courses.description: Build AI that knows your data. Embeddings, vector databases, chunking, retrieval, and hybrid search.

courses.title: The Automation Lab
courses.description: Multi-agent systems. Orchestration, communication, conflict resolution, monitoring, and the conscience layer.

courses.title: Multi-Agent Orchestration
courses.description: Coordinate teams of AI agents. Routing, delegation, consensus, and fault-tolerant multi-agent architectures.

courses.title: Building AI Products
courses.description: From idea to revenue. Product design, pricing, launch strategy, and scaling AI-native businesses.

courses.title: AI Infrastructure & DevOps
courses.description: Production AI systems. Edge functions, databases, caching, monitoring, and cost optimization at scale.

courses.title: AI for Enterprise Strategy
courses.description: Enterprise AI transformation. Governance, procurement, change management, and measuring organizational AI maturity.

courses.title: Advanced Content Generation Pipeline
courses.description: Build automated content factories. Multi-format output, quality control, brand consistency, and distribution at scale.

courses.title: AI Voice & Audio Engineering
courses.description: Text-to-speech, voice cloning, podcast automation, music generation, and audio post-production with AI.

courses.title: The Convergence Lab
courses.description: The capstone. Build your own AI twin — persistent memory, autonomous agents, and human-AI convergence. This is where it all comes together.
